title: Add classical 4-gram non-record submission
author: Muhtasham

data.description: Discounted hashed 4-gram language model with unigram and bigram backoff.
Classical non-neural submission built from the official fineweb10B_sp1024 train export and evaluated without training-data access during final evaluation.

novel_contributions: Discounted hashed 4-gram model with unigram/bigram backoff
Artifact built from the official fineweb10B_sp1024 train export
Exact evaluation on the official fineweb_val_* split
Final evaluation uses saved artifact via --load-state only
Fits under the 16MB decimal artifact cap
